dashboard.currentRole: Current role: {role}. The sidebar and this page only show sections this role can access.
dashboard.hiddenForRole: Your account role is {role}; admin actions are hidden.
dashboard.title: Admin Overview

logs.hiddenTitle: Tagged with hide; excluded from the home page and ordinary searches

ops.scopeAdmin: Admins can see every user; non-admins only see their own uploads and transcode jobs.
ops.scopeOwn: This only shows files and transcode jobs uploaded by you.
ops.title: Uploads & Transcode

page.loginDescription: Upload history and admin operations require an account.
page.title: Admin / {section}
page.localImportSoon: Local import will be wired to a file importer later; for now use the upload page or Token/Cookie sync.
page.cookieRequired: Cookie sync requires a saved Cookie or a temporary browser Cookie.
page.rebuildCacheDone: Rebuild and cache refresh complete · assets {assets}
page.tokenRequired: PIXIV_REFRESH_TOKEN was not detected. Enter an OAuth/Token value, or switch to temporary Cookie sync.
page.transcodeAlreadyRunning: A transcode job is already running

descriptions.accounts: Current account password, API tokens, and admin user maintenance.
descriptions.dashboard: Role-aware summary of available admin entries.
descriptions.developer: Backend config editing, node status, and developer maintenance actions.
descriptions.maintenance: Database rebuilds, media cache generation, and cloud storage settings.
descriptions.operations: Upload history, transcode queue, and recent upload logs.
descriptions.pixiv: Pixiv sync, OAuth/Token/Cookie credentials, and sync logs.
descriptions.security: Security toggles, rate limits, access logs, and role/user quotas.
descriptions.tags: Tag aliases, tag summary filters, and summary exports.

stageDetails.encoding_thumb: Preview is complete; generating the AVIF thumbnail.
stageDetails.encoding_webp: Writing the animated WebP preview. This encoder saves in one pass, so progress jumps to the thumbnail stage after it finishes.
stageDetails.reading_frames: Reading, transposing, and resizing frames; fps is the current preprocessing speed.
stageDetails.waiting: Waiting for the next progress update.

accounts.developerCreateHint: Developer accounts can only be created by an existing developer or the local CLI.
accounts.existingUsersHint: Regular users can be reset here; admin/developer passwords must be changed by the account owner above or through the developer console.
accounts.passwordMismatch: The two new passwords do not match
accounts.privilegedPasswordHint: Privileged account passwords can only be changed by the account owner or through the developer console
accounts.saveTokenNow: Save this now; it is shown only once:

developer.configSaved: Config written; restart the backend for full effect
developer.consoleDescription: Multi-node backend listing is reserved; this currently exposes local developer maintenance actions.
developer.consoleDisabled: Developer console is disabled. Enable console_enabled in config and restart the backend.
developer.enterUserAndPassword: Enter a username and new password
developer.networkHint: Proxy profiles store the server URL in plain text. Enable proxy_auth only when the proxy requires credentials; proxy passwords are encrypted when a deployment key is present.
developer.proxyPasswordConfigured: This proxy password is configured. Leave it empty to keep the current value, or enter a new password to replace and encrypt it.
developer.saveWarning: Saving rewrites the TOML file. Most settings need a backend restart to fully apply. Empty secret_key, Pixiv token/cookie, and proxy password fields keep their old values; saving auto-generates secret_key when it is missing.
developer.secretHint: The deployment key encrypts Pixiv credentials, proxy passwords, and cloud storage credentials. Setup pre-generates it; multi-instance deployments must use the same value on every backend.

maintenance.cloudDescription: Config writes to nyagallery.toml; restart the backend after saving for full effect.
maintenance.developerOnly: Cloud storage config is only available to the developer role.
maintenance.developerOnlyHint: This account can run maintenance tasks, but cannot edit cloud storage strategies. Use a developer account on this page.
maintenance.emptyStrategies: No cloud storage strategies yet; only local is used.
maintenance.encryptionDisabled: Deployment key is not enabled: cloud storage password/token/access_key_secret values are only masked in the UI and are not encrypted when written to TOML. Saving config will auto-generate security.secret_key.
maintenance.encryptionEnabled: Deployment key is enabled: cloud storage password/token/access_key_secret values are encrypted in TOML and only masked in the UI.
maintenance.rebuildDescription: Rebuild the index from metadata JSON, optionally regenerating preview cache too.

pixiv.backupLoginHint: Backup login entry; this is not a callback.
pixiv.cliLoginHint: If you do not want to enter your Pixiv password on the page, run this on the server or your own machine:
pixiv.cliTokenHint: Tokens starting with a dash can be pasted directly; for CLI sync, use --refresh-token=... or an environment variable.
pixiv.cookieLabelPlaceholder: Label, e.g. main browser session / backup
pixiv.encryptionDisabled: Deployment key is not enabled: Pixiv Token/Cookie and proxy passwords are only masked in the UI and are not encrypted at rest. Generate security.secret_key in deployment config first.
pixiv.encryptionEnabled: Deployment key is enabled: saved Pixiv Token/Cookie and proxy passwords are encrypted at rest and only masked in the UI.
pixiv.envTokenDetected: PIXIV_REFRESH_TOKEN environment variable detected; public artworks are still better fetched without login.
pixiv.localImportHint: You can import PixivBatchDownloader-named files from the upload page first; metadata manifest import will be wired later.
pixiv.manualOauthHint: Manual callback/code exchange is only a fallback. Pixiv redirects may stop at post-redirect or third-party callbacks; for stable use, return to OAuth and run the local browser login helper.

oauthErrors.loginUrl: This is the Pixiv login entry, not a callback. Open it and finish login first.
oauthErrors.openLoginFirst: Open the Pixiv login entry first.
oauthErrors.pasteCallback: Paste a Pixiv callback URL or code.
oauthErrors.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the new window. Click the login link below.
oauthErrors.postRedirect: This is a Pixiv redirect page. Continue on Pixiv and then copy the callback.
oauthErrors.startUrl: This is a Pixiv start page, not a callback. Return to the Pixiv redirect page and continue.
oauthErrors.thirdParty: This is a third-party pixiv.pictures callback and does not belong to this login. Click NyaGallery's Pixiv login entry again.

oauthHints.callback: Recognized as a Pixiv callback; it can be exchanged for a Token.
oauthHints.code: Recognized as a code; it can be exchanged for a Token.
oauthHints.empty: Paste the final callback URL here, or paste only the code.
oauthHints.login: This is the login entry. Open it, finish Pixiv login, then copy the callback.
oauthHints.post_redirect: This is a Pixiv redirect page. Continue Pixiv redirect will reopen that page.
oauthHints.start: This is a Pixiv start page; NyaGallery cannot submit it directly. A final callback or code is required.
oauthHints.third_party: This is a third-party callback and does not belong to this NyaGallery OAuth flow.
oauthHints.unknown: Unrecognized content: a final callback URL or code is required.

pixiv.oauthMissingDependency: pixiv-login is not installed on the backend. Install it and restart.
pixiv.oauthNeedUsername: Enter the Pixiv ID / email first.
pixiv.pasteBrowserTokenPlaceholder: Paste the refresh token output from pixiv-login-browser
pixiv.pixivLoginMissing: pixiv-login is not installed on the backend. Run python -m pip install -e ".[pixiv-login]" in the backend environment and restart.
pixiv.pixivPasswordPlaceholder: Only used for this OAuth login
pixiv.publicHint: Public artworks can be fetched without login; Token/Cookie is only for account-related sources.
pixiv.publicModeDescription: Good for single artworks and public user works, including publicly accessible R-18/R-18G info. Bookmarks, following, and private context still require OAuth or Cookie.
pixiv.publicModeRateHint: Public mode is usually less likely to trigger 429 than logged-in mode; still keep a reasonable request delay.
pixiv.publicModeTitle: Public fetch: do not use Pixiv login state.
pixiv.proxyEnabled: Pixiv proxy is enabled; metadata, original downloads, and OAuth requests are sent through the backend proxy.
pixiv.savedCookieNone: Do not use a saved item; use the temporary Cookie above
pixiv.savedTokenNone: Do not use a saved item; use the temporary Token above / environment variable
pixiv.title: Pixiv Config
pixiv.tokenLabelPlaceholder: Label, e.g. main account / R18 visible / backup
pixiv.tokenRequiredPlaceholder: Required when no environment variable is configured
pixiv.useEnvPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the backend environment variable
pixiv.visibleLoginRunning: Visible browser login is running. Complete login in the popped-up browser.
pixiv.visibleLoginTokenReceived: Visible browser login received Refresh Token
pixiv.visibleOauthPasswordHint: Pixiv ID/password can be left empty; sign in directly on the popped-up Pixiv page. On public servers without a desktop, use the visible-browser command or paste a Token manually.
pixiv.visibleOauthRequirement: Requires pixiv-login on the server. The browser window appears on the machine running the backend; local self-hosting can complete CAPTCHA, Passkey, or 2FA directly.
pixiv.visibleOauthTitle: Main OAuth flow: start a visible Pixiv login browser.

security.accessLogPlaceholder: Filter IP / user / path / rejection reason
security.title: Security & Access Control
security.userOverrideHint: Higher priority than role overrides; 0 inherits

tags.createFirst: Create this tag in the tag catalog first
tags.title: Tag Aliases

auth.loginDescription: Sign in with your username and password. The web session is stored in an HttpOnly cookie.
auth.remember30Days: Keep me signed in for 30 days

gallery.emptyDescription: Try different tags, or sync a few artworks first

asset.apiStoragePathHint: Internal storage relative path, for reference only
asset.deleteConfirm: Mark this asset as pending cleanup?
asset.editTagsHint: Separate tags with spaces. Use canonical names, such as character:misaka_mikoto. Unregistered tags will be rejected.
asset.fileCannotPreview: This file type cannot be previewed inline by the browser.
asset.multiPageHint: {count} pages in this artwork. Click page numbers on the right to jump; resource links follow the current page.
asset.purgeConfirm: Purge permanently? Files will be deleted and cannot be restored.
asset.resourceLinksHint: Original files require Authorization: Bearer <token>. Preview cache falls back to the original if it has not been generated yet.

faq.description: NyaGallery is a self-hosted gallery for archiving Pixiv and locally uploaded images. It keeps originals intact and manages personal collections with tags, search, preview cache, and permissions.

featureItems.archive: Pixiv sync, upload archiving, metadata JSON, and database rebuilds.
featureItems.auth: Password login, cookie sessions, API tokens, permissions, and security limits.
featureItems.media: AVIF/WEBP preview cache, animated previews, transcode progress, and upload logs.
featureItems.tags: Szurubooru-style tags, aliases, autocomplete, and filename search.

faq.metaDescription: NyaGallery features, reference projects, and related links.

notes.pbd: Pixiv batch download and archival workflow references
notes.szurubooru: Tag system and gallery management ideas

faq.title: About NyaGallery

search.description: Search or randomize after entering tags. Click tags below to add them quickly.
search.emptyRandom: No matching images. Try another tag.
search.inputPlaceholder: Press Enter after typing a tag
search.title: Search

upload.defaultArtistPlaceholder: Leave blank; each item can override it
upload.defaultTagsPlaceholder: Press Enter after tags; applied to all items
upload.description: Supports multiple files and repeated additions. Original bytes are never modified; only AVIF / WEBP cache is generated.
upload.dragHint: Multiple selection is supported. Files upload in the selected order.
upload.empty: No files yet. Add a few first.
upload.loginDescription: Upload requires editor, admin, or developer permission.
upload.sourceIdPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the SHA256 prefix
upload.tagAliasesPlaceholder:
character:misaka_mikoto = Misaka Mikoto, Mikoto
railgun -> series:toaru
upload.title: Upload Artwork
